description: Data version control system that tracks large files, datasets, and machine learning models, enabling reproducible research workflows and enhancing research software sustainability through proper data and model versioning.
name: DVC

indicators.Sustainability: measures Sustainability by enabling version control of data and models, ensuring reproducibility of experiments and long-term usability of research workflows.
indicators.Fairness: measures Fairness by promoting transparency and traceability of datasets and models, supporting proper attribution and reproducible sharing of research outputs.

useCases: Track and version datasets and machine learning models in research workflows
Ensure reproducibility of experiments by managing data and pipeline versions
Collaborate on data-driven projects with consistent version control practices
Maintain transparency and traceability of research outputs over time
